category_sources: source_facts.description says MIT/GNU Scheme development tools and runtime library; GNU project page describes it as a Scheme implementation with interpreter, compiler, debugger, editor, and runtime library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is the GNU MIT/GNU Scheme page; official GNU documentation title uses MIT/GNU Scheme.
docs_sources: Official GNU project page lists documentation; official GNU user and reference manuals are dedicated documentation pages.
repo_sources: Official GNU project page points development sources to Savannah; FSF directory lists Savannah VCS checkout for mit-scheme.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNU page identify Scheme implementation, interpreter, compiler, and runtime library.
